survey.title: Foundation Survey
survey.subtitle: Help your agent understand who you are
survey.question: Question
survey.required: Please answer this question before continuing
survey.pronounHeading: Set up how your agent speaks
survey.pronounSub: Before training, define the address forms and pronoun rules for the people in your life. Your agent will follow these exactly — no guessing.
survey.pronounCard1Body: Organise everyone by type (Family, Friend, Work) then role (Mother, Best Friend, Boss). Add real names inside roles. Your agent knows exactly who is talking.
survey.pronounCard2Body: For each role, set how your agent addresses them and how it refers to itself. For example: address Mother as "မေမေ", refer to self as "သား". These rules are enforced strictly — no substitutions.
survey.pronounCard3Body: "နင်" and "မင်း" forbidden for Mother means your agent will never use those words with her. Block anything disrespectful or wrong for a relationship.
survey.pronounNote: The system already set up default roles for your language. You can edit them, add people, and adjust pronoun rules — or skip this for now and come back in settings any time. The defaults are a good starting point.
survey.pronounSkipBtn: Skip for now — go to training
survey.pronounHint: You can always edit pronoun rules later in Settings → Relationships
survey.saveError: Failed to save. Please try again.
survey.q_full_name_sub: This is how your agent will know you.
survey.q_age_sub: Used to understand age gaps with the people in your life.
survey.q_birthdate_sub: Day, month, year — however you prefer to write it.
survey.q_blood_type_sub: Optional — your agent can answer questions about this.
survey.q_past_locations_sub: Add as many places as you want. One per line.

interview.title: Voice Interview
interview.subtitle: Answer 8 questions about your life. Speak naturally in your language.
interview.reviewSubtitle: This is what the system understood. Edit anything that doesn't feel right.
interview.doneSubtitle: Your agent now knows who you are. Start training to go deeper.
interview.noAudioSupport: Your browser doesn't support audio recording. Please use Chrome or Firefox.
interview.micPermission: Microphone permission denied. Please allow access in your browser settings.
interview.emptyTranscript: No speech detected. Please try again.
interview.answerRequired: Please record an answer before continuing.

nav.insufficientSouls: Not enough souls to train. Please top up to continue.

dashboard.subtitle: Your agent grows with every memory you share.
dashboard.talkSubtitle: See how it responds like you
dashboard.subtitle0: Your agent is ready to learn. Share your first memory whenever you feel ready.
dashboard.subtitle7days: It's been a while. Share something new — even a small memory matters.
dashboard.subtitle5: Your agent is just beginning to know you. Keep sharing your stories.
dashboard.subtitle20: Your agent is growing. Every memory makes it more like you.
dashboard.subtitleDone: Your agent knows you well. Keep sharing — every story matters.
dashboard.nudgeMessage: Your agent hasn't been trained in {days} days.
dashboard.nudgeAction: Share a memory to keep it sharp.
dashboard.patternsLabel: What your agent knows about you
dashboard.patternsEmpty: Patterns emerge after more training. Keep sharing your stories.
dashboard.progressEmpty: No memories yet. Start training to see your progress here.

questions.disagreement_style: When you disagree with someone, you:
questions.response_length: How long are your typical responses when talking?
questions.close_friends_talking_style: Describe how you talk with your close friends:
questions.anger_expression: When you get angry, people around you:
questions.stranger_first_instinct: When you meet someone new, your first instinct is:
questions.trust_speed: How long does it take you to trust someone?
questions.misunderstood_trait: What do people misunderstand about you?
questions.slang_frequency: How often do you use slang?
questions.language_mixing: Do you mix languages when talking?
questions.advice_style: How do you give advice to people you care about?
questions.worldview: How do you see the world generally?
questions.core_thinking_trait: Something core about how you think that people should know:
questions.daily_language_style: When you talk or write day to day, you use:
questions.language_mix_frequency: How naturally do you mix languages mid-sentence?
questions.other_languages: Any other languages you can speak or understand? (optional)

stranger_formality: Polite but casual — friendly without being too open
Friendly immediately — treat everyone like I know them
Depends on the vibe — I read the person first
disagreement_style: Say it directly — I tell them what I think
Say it carefully — I make sure not to offend
Stay quiet — not worth the conflict
response_length: Short — I get to the point fast
Medium — I explain enough to be understood
Long — I give full context so nothing is misunderstood
anger_expression: Know immediately — it shows on my face and tone
Can tell but I control it — I don't explode
Usually can't tell — I keep it inside
I go quiet — silence is my anger
stress_behaviour: Talk more — I need to process out loud
Go quiet — I need space to think
Get irritable — small things bother me more
Focus and work through it — stress makes me productive
stranger_first_instinct: Open and curious — I want to know them
Friendly but watching — I'm nice but I'm observing
Polite but guarded — I keep distance until I know them
Reserved — I let them come to me
trust_speed: Quick — I give people a chance until they prove otherwise
Medium — I need to see them be consistent over time
Long — trust is earned, not given
slang_frequency: Often — it's natural in my speech
Heavy — slang is just how I talk
language_mixing: Never — I stick to one language
Sometimes — certain words just fit better in another language
Depends on who I'm talking to
humor_style: Dry/deadpan — I say funny things with a straight face
Sarcastic — I joke by saying the opposite
Warm and obvious — I laugh at my own jokes
Dark — I find humor in dark things
Rarely — I'm not really a joke person
swearing_frequency: Often — it's just part of how I talk
decision_style: Go with gut immediately — I trust my instinct
Think it through logically — I need to analyze
Talk to people first — I want input
Sleep on it — I need time
advice_style: Direct — I tell them exactly what I think even if it's hard
Gentle — I ask questions to guide them to the answer
Only if asked — I don't give unsolicited advice
I share my experience and let them decide
worldview: Realist — I see things as they are
Pessimist — I prepare for the worst
Depends on the area of life
daily_language_style: My native language only — I rarely use English
Mostly my native language — some English words mixed in naturally
Half native, half English — I switch constantly
Mostly English — my native language comes in sometimes
language_mix_frequency: Always — it just comes out that way
Rarely — I try to stay in one language

train.pageSubtitle: Tell your agent something real. A feeling, a belief, a moment that shaped you.
train.chatInitialMessage: What memory would you like to share with me?
train.reviewQuestion: Should I install this into my memory?
train.chatReinforced: This memory has been reinforced — strengthened {count} times now. Would you like to tell me more?
train.chatSaved: Your memory is successfully installed in my brain. Would you like to tell me more?
train.chatReenter: Of course — please tell me what you'd like to say.
train.chatUserYesMore: Yes, I have more to share

chat.title: Testing Chat
chat.inputHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
chat.gateWhoAreYou: Who are you to this person?
chat.gateKnownPersonHint: If you have been added as a known person, entering your name loads your personal settings.
chat.identityHonorificHint: Helps choose the right honorific — e.g. အကို vs ဦးလေး in Burmese, พี่ vs ลุง in Thai.

slang.title: Slang Dictionary
slang.subtitle: Teach your agent how you really talk.
slang.meaningPlaceholder: Add a meaning and press Enter
slang.examplePlaceholder: Add an example and press Enter
slang.grammarPlaceholder: e.g. comes at end of sentence
slang.usagePlaceholder: e.g. casual approval with close friends

auth.registerSubtitle: Your agent is waiting to be born
auth.name: Your Name
auth.namePlaceholder: How should your agent know you?

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile, public chat link, and account.
settings.publicLinkSub: Share this with people you've given access keys to. They'll use it to chat with your agent.
settings.slugHint: Letters, numbers and hyphens only. Min 3 characters. This changes your public chat URL.
settings.navRelationshipsSub: Manage people, roles and access keys
settings.navVoiceSub: Clone your voice for agent responses
settings.dangerSub: Permanently delete your account, agent, and all memories. This cannot be undone.

relationships.title: Relationships
relationships.subtitle: Define who can talk to your agent and how it responds.
relationships.selectTypeEmpty: Select a type to see roles
relationships.selectRoleEmpty: Select a role to see people
relationships.noPeople: No people added. Role defaults apply to everyone in this role.
relationships.systemTypeHint: System type — English name cannot be changed.
relationships.systemRoleHint: System role — name cannot be changed.
relationships.addrFormsOverrideSub: — leave empty to use role defaults
relationships.realMessages: Real messages sent to this person
relationships.accessKeySub: — they'll use this to enter public chat
relationships.accessKeyHint: A suggestion is pre-filled. Edit it or click ↻ to regenerate. Share this key with {name} — they'll need it to chat.
relationships.fieldsInheritHint: Fields left empty inherit from the role.
relationships.tonePersonPlaceholder: Optional. How the agent should sound specifically with this person.
relationships.formsEmpty: No forms — click Add to start.
relationships.formsCustomPlaceholder: In English — e.g. younger female, older male 1-15 years

memories.title: Memories
memories.subtitle: Everything your agent has learned about you
memories.reviewBannerSub: from your Present may be outdated — review them
memories.emptySearchHint: Try a different search term or clear the filters
memories.emptyHint: Start training your agent to build its memory
memories.reviewMovePastTitle: Move to Past — it happened but it's over
memories.dialogDesc: These Present memories are older than 90 days. Decide what's still true.
memories.dialogAllDone: All caught up — nothing left to review.

neo.title: Neo Mode
neo.subtitle: Install knowledge packages into your agent's brain. When visitors enable Neo Mode, your agent answers with your memories and your expertise.
neo.infoBlock: Visitors toggle Neo Mode in chat. When off — pure memory chat. When on — memories + your installed packages. Unrelated questions get a natural redirect.
neo.uninstallBody: {title} will be removed from slot {n}. The slot will be free to use again.
neo.uninstallWarning: This cannot be undone. Visitors will no longer have access to this knowledge.
neo.sensitiveWarning: Sensitive domain — a disclaimer is auto-added to every response.
neo.slotWillReplace: Slot {n} has "{title}" — it will be replaced.
neo.customInstrPlaceholder: Specialize this package. Must stay within the {title} domain.
neo.customInstrInfo: Instructions are validated to match the {title} domain.
neo.autoInstrHint: AI will generate comprehensive knowledge content for this domain.
neo.knowledgePlaceholder: Write everything you know about this topic. Explain it as if teaching someone completely new.
neo.autoInfo: Content is generated by AI based on your title, then validated before saving.
neo.manualInfo: Content is validated for coherence and safety. Domain tags are extracted automatically.
neo.domainWarning: Instructions must stay within the {title} domain. Unrelated topics will be rejected.
neo.instrPlaceholder: Specialization for {title}. Stay within the domain.

agentProfile.title: Profile Settings
agentProfile.subtitle: Update your account email and your agent's identity.
agentProfile.imageSectionHint: This image represents your agent to people who chat with it.
agentProfile.imageHint: JPG, PNG, WEBP or GIF · Max 10MB
agentProfile.nameSectionHint: The name your agent uses to identify itself.
agentProfile.emailSectionHint: Used for login. Changing this takes effect immediately.
